---
title: "Assessing the impact of vegetated curb cuts on temperature mitigation and biodiversity support in Trois-Rivières"
author: "Isabella C. Richmond, Emma Bacon, Nicole Yu, Kayleigh Hutt-Taylor, Carly D. Ziter"
title-slide-attributes:
  data-background-image: /presentation_imgs/image832.png
  data-background-opacity: "0.65"
format: 
  revealjs:
    theme: simple
    slide-number: c
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---


## Green infrastructure plays many roles in our cities

::: {layout="[[-1], [1], [-1]]"}
![](presentation_imgs/Picture1.png){fig-align="center"}
:::

## Vegetated curb cuts are designed for stormwater management 

:::: {.columns}

:::: {.column}

![](presentation_imgs/IMG_1254.jpeg){width=75%}

::::

:::: {.column}

::: {layout="[[-1], [1], [-1]]"}

![](presentation_imgs/biorentention.png)

:::

::::

::::


## Vegetated curb cuts have many cobenefits

{{< video presentation_imgs/IMG_1259.MOV  width="1000" height="500" >}}


## Rue St Maurice as a case study 


::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="40%"}

::: {layout="[[-1], [1], [-1]]"}
- 54 curb cuts were installed in 2018
- 20,000 plants were planted in 2018 and monitored for 3 years after
- different configurations 
::: 

:::

::: {.column}

![](presentation_imgs/before.png){width=80% fig-align="right"}

:::

:::



## What is the impact of vegetated curb cut presence and design on different cobenefits? 

1. Temperature 

1. Pollinator interactions 

1. Vegetative beauty / aesthetics

add map? photos? 

## Temperature is cooler in vegetated curb-cuts 

plot w temp contrasts 

## Configuration of vegetated curb-cuts affects temperature 

plot w configuration contrasts 

## Configuration causes differences in pollinator interactions 

plot w bee interaction contrasts 

## vegetation .... ? 

how to incorporate veg 

## {background-image="presentation_imgs/IMG_1257.jpeg"}

::: columns
::: {.column width="90%"}
::: {style="background-color: #c0c0beff; opacity: 80%"}

**Vegetated curb cuts have benefits for human and non-human residents in cities**


:::
:::
:::

## Thank you! 

::: columns
::: {.column width="60%"}
![](presentation_imgs/ZULE_logo_green.png){width=50%}

![](presentation_imgs/LabPhoto2024.jpeg){width="70%"
fig-align="center"}
:::

::: {.column width="40%"}
::: {layout="[[-1], [1], [-1]]"}
-   Collaborators + Cami
-   ...
:::
:::
:::


## Questions ?

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}
![](presentation_imgs/IMG_1240.jpeg){width=80%}

::: 

::: {.column width="50%"}
![](presentation_imgs/IMG_1250.jpeg){width=80%}
:::
